markets.question: Will Microsoft (MSFT) close above $405 end of April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the official closing price for Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) on the final trading day of April 2026 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If the final trading day of the month is shortened (for example, due to a market-holiday schedule), the official closing price published for that shortened session will still be used for resolution.

If no official closing price is published for that session (for example, due to a trading halt into the close, system issue, or other disruption), the market will use the last valid on-exchange trade price of the regular session as the effective closing price.

The resolution source for this market is Yahoo Finance — specifically, the Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) "Close" prices available at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/MSFT/history, published under "Historical Prices."

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Yahoo Finance.

eventMetadata.context_description: Microsoft shares traded sharply lower on April 30, down over 4% intraday to around $407 from the prior close of $424, primarily driven by investor reaction to yesterday's fiscal Q3 2026 earnings beat—revenue hit $82.9 billion (up 18% year-over-year) with EPS of $4.27 topping consensus, fueled by 40% Azure cloud growth—offset by a capex guidance hike to $190 billion raising margin pressure fears amid heavy AI spending. Trading volume exceeds 46 million shares, reflecting heightened positioning as the month-end close nears resolution. Analyst consensus targets average $560, implying significant upside potential, though near-term sentiment weighs capex risks and broader tech sector volatility; no major catalysts remain before today's bell.

markets.question: WTT - Men's Singles: New Zealand vs Morocco
markets.description:
This market refers to the table tennis match between New Zealand and Morocco in a WTT event, scheduled for April 30 at 2:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Zealand' if New Zealand wins against Morocco.

This market will resolve to 'Morocco' if Morocco wins against New Zealand.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Slay Baron Nashor?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay the Baron Nashor at least once during Game 2. Baron Nashor is a powerful neutral objective in League of Legends that first spawns at 20:00 game time and respawns 6 minutes after each death, granting the slaying team the Hand of Baron buff.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both UB Alma Mater and ⁠Movistar KOI Fénix each slay Baron Nashor at least once during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay Baron Nashor during Game 2.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain Baron Nashor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: UB Alma Mater vs ⁠Movistar KOI Fénix (BO3) - LES Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between UB Alma Mater and ⁠Movistar KOI Fénix in the LES Regular Season, initially scheduled for April 29 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "UB Alma Mater" if UB Alma Mater win the match against ⁠Movistar KOI Fénix.

This market will resolve to "⁠Movistar KOI Fénix" if ⁠Movistar KOI Fénix win the match against UB Alma Mater.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Movistar KOI Fénix holds a commanding 3-0 record in LES 2026 Spring regular season play with a 6-1 game differential, fueled by recent 2-0 sweeps over LUA Gaming and FLK Esports plus a 2-1 win against Barça eSports, positioning them second in standings behind undefeated Team Heretics Academy. UB Alma Mater struggles with just one win in their last five matches and ranks outside the top tier, compounded by a prior 0-2 loss to Fénix in the February LES Kick-off Tournament final where Fénix claimed first place. No major roster changes or patch shifts noted; BO3 format amplifies Fénix's momentum in group stage playoff positioning, though UB's home crowd could spark an upset in this closely watched matchup.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Slay a Dragon?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 2. In League of Legends, elemental dragons (Infernal, Mountain, Ocean, Hextech, Chemtech, and Cloud) spawn in the dragon pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next dragon spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Dragon Soul (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent dragon spawns become Elder Dragons.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both UB Alma Mater and ⁠Movistar KOI Fénix each slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay any elemental dragon during Game 2. Only elemental dragons count toward this market — Elder Dragon kills do not count.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain at least one elemental dragon prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Will South Korea ETF (EWY) hit (HIGH) $158 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for South Korea ETF (EWY) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the South Korea ETF (EWY) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.EWY%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.EWY%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will South Korea ETF (EWY) hit in May 2026?
events.description: What will South Korea ETF (EWY) hit in May 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: The iShares MSCI South Korea ETF (EWY), currently trading around $156 with a market cap exceeding $11 billion, has surged over 25% in April 2026 alone, mirroring the KOSPI's record-breaking rally past 6,600 points and toward 7,000, fueled by semiconductor giants like Samsung Electronics amid robust AI-driven chip demand and optimism from Middle East ceasefire prospects. Year-to-date gains top 59%, outpacing global peers, supported by strong Q1 GDP growth from exports and construction. Bank of Korea held the base rate at 2.50% on April 10, signaling data-dependent policy amid cooling inflation. Traders monitor the May 28 BoK decision, U.S. big tech earnings, and Q1 corporate results for potential volatility as EWY approaches monthly highs.

eventMetadata.context_description: Round 1 action at the Cadillac Championship on Trump National Doral's demanding Blue Monster Course has Cameron Young leading at 8-under through 18 holes, with Jordan Spieth and Alex Smalley tied at 7-under, boosting their top-10 prospects amid ongoing play for stars like Collin Morikawa and Rickie Fowler (both 4-under early). Pre-tournament withdrawals by Patrick Cantlay (illness), Rory McIlroy, Xander Schauffele, Ludvig Aberg, and Matt Fitzpatrick thinned the signature event field, enhancing implied probabilities for elite remainders like Scottie Scheffler, whose dominant 2026 form and ball-striking suit the 7,739-yard par-72 layout. Traders factor course history—strong for Fowler and Adam Scott—rest advantages post-Masters, and steady Miami conditions over Rounds 2-4.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Rounds?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined rounds played by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined rounds played by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined rounds" is the sum of rounds won by both teams during the match, including any overtime rounds if applicable. For example, a match ending 13–11 would have a total of 24 rounds (even), while a match ending 13–10 would have a total of 23 rounds (odd).

If Map 1 is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the Exort Series #26 Contenders Stage swiss bracket, both Privateer Gaming and Hermine Esports Club enter their Round 2 low match at 0-1, needing a win to avoid elimination in this C-Tier online European CS2 event. Privateer showed resilience in a 0-2 Round 1 loss to undefeated FORZE Reload, dropping 19-26 rounds across competitive maps like Ancient and Nuke for a -7 RD. Hermine, meanwhile, suffered a Round 1 forfeit to Oldboys without playing rounds, amid early April roster changes adding fiction and kdaN—unproven starters with subpar recent HLTV ratings below 1.0 in limited action. Trader consensus reflects Privateer's edge in recent ESEA Entry Division showings versus Hermine's DraculaN group stage struggles, though BO3 map vetoes and team synergy remain pivotal upset factors.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chicago be between 46-47°F on May 2?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chicago O'Hare Intl Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 2 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chicago O'Hare Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/il/chicago/KORD.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

events.title: Clube do Remo vs. SE Palmeiras
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Brazil Série A game, scheduled for Sunday, May 10, 2026 between Clube do Remo and SE Palmeiras.

eventMetadata.context_description: Palmeiras' strong second-place standing in Serie A, with 22 goals already amid solid away form (D W W L W), drives trader consensus to a 57% implied probability for victory over struggling 16th-placed Remo, who sit low on 13 goals despite recent home resilience including a 0-0 draw against Grêmio and a 4-1 upset win over Bahia. markets.question: Will the Bahujan Samaj Party (BSP) win the most seats in the 2026 Puducherry Legislative Assembly election?
markets.description:
Legislative Assembly elections are to be scheduled to be held in Puducherry, India, in April–June 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the Puducherry Legislative Assembly in the 2026 election.

If the results are not known definitively by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

In the event of a tie between multiple parties for the most seats won, this market will resolve in favor of the party that received a greater number of valid votes. If that also results in a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the party whose listed abbreviation appears first in alphabetical order.

This market’s resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the Puducherry Legislative Assembly.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results reported by the Indian government, specifically the Election Commission of India (ECI) (https://eci.gov.in). If multiple official reports differ, this market will resolve based on the one that includes the greatest number of Assembly Constituencies (ACs).

eventMetadata.context_description: Following the April 9, 2026, polling in Puducherry's 30-member Legislative Assembly election—which saw a record 89.87% voter turnout—exit polls released on April 29 project the incumbent AINRC-led NDA alliance securing 16-25 seats, driving trader consensus at 96.3% implied probability for AINRC as the largest single party and winner. Chief Minister N. Rangasamy's AINRC, contesting 16 seats alongside BJP's 10, benefits from incumbency, stable NDA seat-sharing finalized in March, and fragmented opposition: INC-DMK SPA (4-12 seats projected) and debut TVK alliance (0-4). Consistent projections across Axis My India, People's Pulse, and others solidify this lead ahead of May 4 counting. Realistic challenges include rare exit poll discrepancies, counting irregularities prompting re-polls, or unexpected post-poll shifts, though uniform pollster consensus limits upside for BJP (15.6%) or INC (2.3%).

markets.question: Spread: CR Vasco da Gama (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Copa Sudamericana game, scheduled for April 30 at 6:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "CR Vasco da Gama" if CR Vasco da Gama win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Club Olimpia".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on conmebol.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

Cuesta (thigh). Olimpia leads Paraguay's Primera División Apertura (10-3-1, +12 GD), but misses right-back César Olmedo (ACL) and faces tough away travel; no head-to-head history. Early group momentum critical against Audax Italiano and Barracas Central, with Vasco's home edge and crowd potentially decisive amid trader focus on lineup confirmations and rest advantages.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Imperial Academy vs Infinite (BO3) - United21 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 1 match between Imperial Academy and Infinite in the United21 Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 9 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Imperial Academy" if Imperial Academy win the match against Infinite.

This market will resolve to "Infinite" if Infinite win the match against Imperial Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Imperial Academy entered the United21 Season 47 playoffs upper bracket quarterfinal BO3 against Infinite with strong trader backing, reflecting their perfect 2-0 group stage record (63-47 map score) versus Infinite's 2-1 finish (-9 map differential). Recent form favored Imperial's stability since their February roster lock-in, with key players like ta9z (1.12 rating) shining amid mixed results including a 2-1 win over MINLATE days prior. Infinite, ranked higher at #65 HLTV, showed momentum from topping United21 League Season 46 and recent roster additions like sl3nd (1.30 rating) and Dytor, but early exits against fnatic and Aurora tempered expectations. Online double-elimination format emphasized map pools, where Imperial held edges on Ancient and Nuke.

markets.question: Abstract FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Abstract's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Abstract doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Atlanta be between 74-75°F on April 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 30 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/ga/atlanta/KATL.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins the nomination for the Democratic Party to contest the VA-02 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The Democratic primary will take place on June 16, 2026.

If no nominee is announced by November 3, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democrat sources, including https://democrats.org/.

Any replacement of the nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Former Rep. Elaine Luria dominates trader consensus at 83.5% implied probability to win the VA-02 Democratic primary on August 4, driven by her incumbency experience from 2019-2023, superior fundraising with $1.75 million raised in Q1 2026 and $2 million cash on hand announced April 2, and DCCC Red to Blue designation plus key endorsements like Gov.-elect Abigail Spanberger. A crowded seven-candidate field leaves challengers like physician Nila Devanath (4.3%, $200k raised) and others fragmented with minimal resources and name recognition. Recent Q1 finance reports and Luria's active campaigning, including a Sandbridge event April 27, reinforce her frontrunner status amid no public polls, though late developments could shift dynamics before summer.

markets.question: Will Club Olimpia win on 2026-04-30?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for April 30, 2026
If Club Olimpia wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: CR Vasco da Gama vs. Club Olimpia
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Copa Sudamericana game, scheduled for Thursday, April 30, 2026 between CR Vasco da Gama and Club Olimpia.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vasco da Gama's home advantage at São Januário underpins trader consensus pricing them at 49.5% implied probability in this Copa Sudamericana Group G clash, despite sitting bottom with 1 point from a draw and loss. Olimpia lead the table unbeaten on 4 points (2-0 win over Audax Italiano, 0-0 vs. Barracas Central), but face a tough Rio de Janeiro atmosphere where Vasco have won four of seven league home games this year. Key Vasco absences from midweek Serie A loss to Corinthians—Thiago Mendes (ankle), Andrés Gómez (thigh), Cuiabano (muscle)—prompt a rotated lineup with Tchê Tchê, Hugo Moura, and Spinelli; Olimpia arrive at full strength atop Paraguay's Primera Division. The 28.5% draw reflects a closely contested matchup, with Olimpia's 22.5% highlighting upset potential.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Ankara be 11°C on May 2?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Esenboğa Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 2 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Esenboğa Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/tr/%C3%A7ubuk/LTAC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Ankara's May 2 highest temperature tightly clusters around 7°C (25.5%), 8°C (33.5%), and 9°C (30.5%), reflecting inherent short-term forecast uncertainty amid a rare late-April Arctic cold air intrusion funneled by an omega blocking pattern over Europe, as shown in recent GFS and ECMWF 850 hPa temperature analyses. This anomalously cool airmass—well below the 22°C May climatological average from Turkish State Meteorological Service baselines—has depressed highs through persistent low-pressure troughing and cloudy skies with westerly winds. Differentiating factors include model divergences on cloud dissipation timing, surface sensible heat flux, and minor boundary layer mixing variations, potentially shifting peaks by 1–2°C; watch MGM and ensemble updates on May 1 for refinements ahead of resolution.

markets.question: Will USA win Group D in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins Group D in the 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage, scheduled for June 11-27, 2026.

If multiple teams tie as group winners, this market will resolve according to the official tiebreak procedure of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If the World Cup group stage is cancelled, postponed after September 30, 2026, or there is otherwise no winner declared for this group within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from FIFA (https://www.fifa.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus reflects a razor-tight Group D race with Türkiye and USA deadlocked at 35% implied probabilities to claim the top spot, driven by offsetting injury concerns and balanced head-to-head history just six weeks from kickoff. Recent reports highlight fitness doubts for Türkiye's Arda Güler (hamstring) and Hakan Çalhanoğlu alongside USA striker Patrick Agyemang's Achilles tear ruling him out, neutralizing the USMNT's home advantage in openers against Paraguay (June 12, Inglewood) and Australia (June 19, Seattle)—matches they won 2-1 in 2025 friendlies. Türkiye's 2-1 friendly triumph over USA that June and late playoff win over Kosovo underscore their technical edge, while Paraguay's gritty defense (17%) is hampered by Diego Gómez's injury, leaving physical Australia (8%) as longshots despite a healthier squad. The pivotal USA-Türkiye finale on June 26 looms as a de facto group decider.

markets.question: Will Iran strike Spain by April 30, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Iran initiates a drone, missile, or air strike on the listed country's soil or any official embassy or consulate of the listed country between market creation and April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM (ET). Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For the purposes of this market, a qualifying "strike" is defined as the use of aerial bombs, drones or missiles (including cruise or ballistic missiles) launched by Iranian military forces that impact a listed country's ground territory or any official embassy or consulate of that country (e.g., if a weapons depot on a listed country soil is hit by an Iranian missile, this market will resolve to "Yes").

Missiles or drones which are intercepted and surface-to-air missile strikes will not be sufficient for a "Yes" resolution regardless of whether they land on a listed country's territory or cause damage.

Strikes within the West Bank or the Gaza Strip, will be counted as Israel.

Only military actions by Iranian forces explicitly claimed by the Islamic Republic of Iran, or confirmed to have originated from Iranian territory, will count toward the resolution of this market. Attacks by proxy forces (i.e., Hezbollah, Houthis, etc.) will not count toward the resolution of this market.

Actions such as artillery fire, small arms fire, FPV or ATGM strikes directly, ground incursions, naval shelling, cyberattacks, or other operations conducted by US or Israeli ground operatives will not qualify.

The resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting.

If the date/time of a strike cannot be confirmed by a consensus of credible reporting by the end of the third calendar date after this market's end date, it will resolve to "No" regardless of whether a strike was later confirmed to have taken place.

eventMetadata.context_description: Burnley and Wolverhampton Wanderers have been mathematically relegated to the Championship after dismal campaigns, with Burnley confirming their drop via a loss to Manchester City last week and manager Scott Parker departing by mutual consent within the past day. The final relegation spot hinges on a tense four-game run-in among Tottenham Hotspur (34 points, -10 GD), West Ham United (36 points, -16 GD), and Nottingham Forest (39 points, -4 GD), with Leeds United (40 points) marginally safer. Tottenham snapped a 14-game winless streak in the Premier League—their first victory of 2026—with a 1-0 win at Wolves, boosting momentum, while West Ham hold recent form but face the league's toughest remaining fixtures. Goal difference and head-to-head results will prove decisive in this closely contested scrap.

markets.question: Will SpaceX's market cap be between $1.8T and $2.0T at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on SpaceX's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no SpaceX IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before 2028".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on SpaceX’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

markets.question: Fed rate hike in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the upper bound of the target federal funds rate is increased at any point between January 1, 2026 and the Fed's December 2026 meeting, currently scheduled for December 8-9, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market may not resolve to "No" until the Fed has released its rate change decision following its December meeting.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the official website of the Federal Reserve (https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm), however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

March 2026 CPI surged to 3.3% year-over-year on energy spikes, yet core inflation held at 2.6%, while nonfarm payrolls rebounded +178,000 and unemployment eased to 4.3%, signaling resilient but balanced growth. This data-dependent stance under outgoing Chair Powell reinforces a "higher for longer" path without hikes, with markets eyeing May CPI and April jobs ahead of the June 16-17 FOMC for potential shifts.

markets.description:

This market will resolve to the country that receives the highest number of points from the televote in the Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2026.

All ties will be broken according to EBU's official Eurovision rules.

If no winner is announced by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Eurovision (https://eurovision.tv/), including live footage of Eurovision 2026, however a consensus of credible reporting will suffice.

eventMetadata.context_description: Israel's Noam Bettan with "Michelle" leads Polymarket's televote winner odds at 32.5% implied probability, reflecting trader consensus on its broad pop appeal and Israel's historical televote strength despite expected jury snubs, bolstered by the March music video release and strong pre-party buzz. Greece's Akylas follows at 20.5% with the high-energy techno "Ferto," which dominated Sing for Greece in February and topped recent OGAE fan votes, fueling diaspora support. Finland's Linda Lampenius & Pete Parkkonen round out the top three at 19.5% via violin-pop "Liekinheitin," the overall contest frontrunner after UMK victory, but seen as jury-leaning. With first rehearsals underway in Vienna ahead of May semis, staging and live performances could spark rapid shifts in this wide-open field.

markets.question: Spread: CD Leganés (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming La Liga 2 game, scheduled for May 1 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "CD Leganés" if CD Leganés win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "RC Deportivo La Coruña".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: RC Deportivo La Coruña vs. CD Leganés - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the La Liga 2 game, scheduled for May 1 at 12:30 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: RC Deportivo La Coruña sits second in the LaLiga 2 table with 61 points from 35 matches, locked in a fierce promotion race just behind leaders Racing Santander and level with Almería, making this home fixture at Estadio Riazor against mid-table CD Leganés (around 15th) pivotal for maintaining automatic promotion position. Depor drew 1-1 at SD Huesca on April 12, extending an unbeaten run in their last five outings with solid defensive form, while hosting strong (eight wins in 17 home games). Leganés notched a 2-1 home win over Albacete on April 11 but lost 2-0 at UD Las Palmas on April 17, showing mixed away struggles. Their September 2-2 draw highlights a competitive head-to-head; Leganés nears recovery for defenders Rubén Peña and Jorge Sáenz from mid-April injuries, but Depor's momentum and home advantage shape trader consensus toward the hosts in this late-season clash.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

eventMetadata.context_description: Leeds United host relegation-threatened Burnley at Elland Road on May 1 in a Premier League clash with home-side momentum from their shock 2-1 win at Manchester United on April 13, boosting mid-table security at 15th with 36 points from 32 games. Burnley languish in 19th after a 0-2 home defeat to Brighton on April 11, winless in six amid 4-8-20 record, heightening desperation ahead of tough fixtures at Nottingham Forest and Manchester City. Leeds face defensive headaches with Joe Rodon and Anton Stach sidelined until early May via ankle injuries, plus Daniel James out; Burnley miss Hannibal Mejbri (hamstring), Axel Tuanzebe (Achilles), and captain Josh Cullen (ACL) long-term. Head-to-head favors Burnley after October's 2-0 win, but Elland Road form and rest advantage tilt trader consensus toward the Whites.

eventMetadata.context_description: Barcelona Femení hold a commanding position in Liga F with a near-perfect 24-0-1 record, propelled by recent thumpings of Real Madrid including a 3-0 quarter-final win on March 29 to secure their UEFA Women's Champions League semi-final spot against Bayern Frauen. Bayern, unbeaten domestically this season atop the Frauen-Bundesliga save for a 7-1 group-stage drubbing by Barcelona in October 2025, advanced via a gritty 5-3 aggregate over Manchester City with late strikes from Viggósdóttir and Dallmann. First leg on April 25 in Munich favors Bayern's home crowd and revenge motive, but Barcelona's depth shines despite Aitana Bonmatí's ongoing fibula absence until early May; Bayern miss winger Klara Bühl (muscle injury). Head-to-head favors Barça (4-1-0), underscoring trader focus on aggregate dynamics, clean sheets, and Salma Paralluelo's form.

markets.question: Will Giannis Antetokounmpo play for the Atlanta Hawks in 2026-27?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the next team Giannis Antetokounmpo officially joins by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo does not officially join a new team by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Milwaukee Bucks”.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo joins a team that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If Giannis Antetokounmpo retires or is not under contract with any professional team by October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

An official acquisition announcement prior to the market’s close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the Milwaukee Bucks and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

markets.question: Will Renan Santos finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
markets.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., https://dadosabertos.tse.jus.br/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent polls consistently position Senator Flávio Bolsonaro as the runner-up behind incumbent President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva in first-round voting intentions for Brazil's October 4 presidential election, fueling his dominant 66% trader consensus for second place. Late April surveys, including AtlasIntel (April 22–27: Lula 46.6%, Flávio 39.7%) and Nexus (April 24–26: Lula 41%, Flávio 36%), show him consolidating right-wing support amid Jair Bolsonaro's ineligibility, far ahead of distant challengers like Renan Santos (3–5%) or Romeu Zema (2–4%). Lula's 21.5% odds reflect scenarios in tightening polls where Flávio surges to first, as in some March matchups. The April 4 candidate deadline has locked in the field, with runoff likely absent a 50% first-round winner.

markets.question: Will Jonas Wind be the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which player will finish as the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season.

If the listed player finishes as the sole top goal scorer in the 2025–26 Bundesliga season, the market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

Goals scored in Bundesliga matches only will count. Goals in other competitions (e.g., DFB-Pokal, German Super Cup, Champions League, Europa League, international matches) will not count for this market.

If multiple players tie for the top goal scorer, the market will resolve to the player whose last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2025–26 Bundesliga season is canceled or not completed by August 1, 2026, the market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official statistics from the Bundesliga. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Harry Kane's commanding 33-goal haul after 30 Bundesliga matchdays has solidified trader consensus at 99.4% implied probability for him to claim the top goalscorer crown, outpacing second-place Deniz Undav's 18 by an insurmountable 15-goal margin with just four games remaining. Bayern Munich's title-clinching 4-2 win over Stuttgart on matchday 30—where Kane scored—exemplifies his clinical finishing and the team's dominance in creating chances via wingers like Michael Olise and Luis Díaz, who bolster his service. Kane's record-breaking pace, including 95 Bundesliga goals in 91 appearances, underscores his consistency amid Bayern's favorable fixtures. Only a catastrophic injury sidelining Kane entirely, paired with multiple hat-tricks from chasers like Undav or Guirassy, could realistically challenge this, though such a scenario remains extraordinarily unlikely given the gap and rivals' form.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy enters the Exort Series #25 Main Stage BO3 matchup against Wave Esports with a refreshed roster since February, anchored by veteran rifler Kiryasoo (0.98 HLTV rating over 45 maps) and coached by S0tF1k (59% career win rate), leveraging Team Spirit's academy infrastructure for structured CS2 play. Wave Esports, ranked #149 globally, fields a March-overhauled lineup featuring newcomers Belof (1.05 rating), Katalic, and sheezy alongside miksozzz, amid a 37.5% win rate in recent tier-3 events like Urban Riga Open and Esplay Backforce Masters. In Swiss Round 1, factors include adaptation to CS2 meta on maps like Dust II, Mirage, and Ancient, pistol round execution, and roster synergy, with no recent head-to-head history shaping trader consensus.

markets.question: Will Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) hit (LOW) $280 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.GOOGL%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.GOOGL%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) hit in May 2026?
events.description: What will Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) hit in May 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Alphabet's blockbuster Q1 2026 earnings, released April 29 with revenue surging 22% to $109.9 billion and Google Cloud rocketing 63% to $20 billion, have propelled GOOGL shares to a recent close of $349.94, fueling trader consensus on Polymarket for an 80% implied probability of hitting $350+ in May. Net income jumped 81% to $62.58 billion, beating estimates amid AI-driven ad and cloud momentum, though shares dipped slightly post-release on raised 2026 capex guidance to $180-190 billion. Analysts' average 12-month price target of $390 reflects optimism on revenue trends and competitive positioning, with macroeconomic risk appetite and sector volatility as key swings ahead of Q2 earnings in late July.

markets.question: Will Natural Gas (NG) hit (LOW) $1.60 in April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during April 2026, any 1-minute candle for the Active Month of Natural Gas futures has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

For Natural Gas futures, the active month refers to the nearest listed contract month. The active month changes at 6:00:00 PM ET at the start of the trading session two business days prior to that contract's last trading day, at which point the next listed contract becomes the active month.

For Natural Gas (NG) futures, the last trading day is defined as the third last business day of the month prior to the contract month, consistent with CME contract specifications.

Only prices achieved during the applicable trading session for the underlying market will be considered. Under the standard schedule, trading is open from 6:00:00 PM ET Sunday through 5:00:00 PM ET Friday, with a daily break from 5:00:00 PM ET to 6:00:00 PM ET, except where modified by holiday or special-session hours as listed on Pyth.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

If the Active Month contract does not trade at all during the listed time frame, this market will resolve to "No".

In the event of a contract specification change, feed change, or similar structural modification affecting the underlying market during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Active Month Natural Gas futures "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore?search=ngd, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter.

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published for the Active Month Natural Gas (NG) futures contract by CME Group may be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Natural Gas (NG) hit in April 2026?
events.description: What will Natural Gas (NG) hit in April 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Henry Hub natural gas spot prices hovered around $2.76/MMBtu late April 2026, reflecting trader consensus on ample supplies amid mild spring weather curbing residential and power sector demand. The EIA's April 30 report revealed a 79 Bcf storage injection for the week ended April 24, lifting inventories to 2,142 Bcf—153 Bcf (7.7%) above the five-year average and 116 Bcf over last year—bolstering bearish sentiment despite a modest intraday futures rally in May contracts to $2.76 settlement. Steady U.S. production near 104 Bcf/d and stable LNG exports further pressure pricing, with market-implied paths pointing to sub-$3 levels barring heatwaves. Key catalysts ahead: May 7 EIA storage update and NOAA seasonal outlooks.

markets.question: Will xAI have the best AI model at the end of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company which owns the model which has the highest arena rank based off the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" section on the Leaderboard tab of https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with the style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Tokyo be 18°C on May 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Tokyo Haneda Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 1 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Tokyo Haneda Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/jp/tokyo/RJTT.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Japan Meteorological Agency's latest forecast for Tokyo on May 1 indicates a daytime high of 22°C under rain clearing to clouds, with 100% morning precipitation probability dropping to 50% afternoon, tempering peak heating and fueling trader caution on the 21°C-or-higher outcome at 39.5%. Competing 20°C (35.5%) and 19°C (23%) probabilities reflect model ensemble spread—JMA, ECMWF, and GFS diverge by 2–3°C due to frontal system timing, cloud cover persistence, and southerly flow variability. Early May climatology averages 21°C highs, with urban heat island effects at the official Tokyo station adding minor upside potential; watch afternoon satellite imagery and updated 12z model runs for resolution shifts.

markets.question: Will President Trump sign 3 pieces of legislation into law in April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of pieces of legislation that are signed into law between April 1, 2026, 12:00 AM and April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. 

Qualifying legislation may include joint resolutions and must pass both the House and the Senate, and must be signed by the President. 

Legislation that becomes law without a signature while Congress remains in session, or becomes law through veto override, as well as Presidential pocket vetoes that expire, will not qualify.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official information from the White House (https://www.whitehouse.gov/), Congress.gov’s legislation tracker (https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/22), the Library of Congress (congress.gov), and other official information from the government of the United States; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: How many pieces of legislation will Trump sign into law in April?
events.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of pieces of legislation that are signed into law between April 1, 2026, 12:00 AM and April 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. 

Qualifying legislation may include joint resolutions and must pass both the House and the Senate, and must be signed by the President. 

Legislation that becomes law without a signature while Congress remains in session, or becomes law through veto override, as well as Presidential pocket vetoes that expire, will not qualify.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official information from the White House (https://www.whitehouse.gov/), Congress.gov’s legislation tracker (https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/22), the Library of Congress (congress.gov), and other official information from the government of the United States; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket strongly favors President Trump signing exactly 6 pieces of legislation into law in April 2026 at 80% implied probability, driven by six confirmed bill signings amid a light congressional calendar typical for late-spring midterms. Key recent actions include H.R. 7147 signed on April 30, H.J.Res. 140 disapproving a Bureau of Land Management public land withdrawal on April 27, H.R. 8322 extending Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act authorities and H.R. 7816 curbing warrantless surveillance both on April 18, plus S. 1884 on Holocaust expropriated art recovery and S. 3971 reauthorizing small business innovation programs on April 13. With April ending and no further enrolled bills awaiting signature, traders assign modest probabilities to 4 (22.5%) or 5 (18.5%), viewing additional action unlikely absent emergency floor votes.

markets.question: Will the Democratic Party win the CA-31 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the CA-31 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

markets.question: Will US crude oil reserves fall to 275M by June 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the U.S. Energy Information Administration publishes a weekly figure for U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve less than or equal to the specified value for any week ending on or before June 5, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve as soon as the listed value is reached, or once data has been released for the final week ending on or before June 5, 2026, and the listed value has not been reached.

If data has not been released for the final week ending on or before June 5 2026, by June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on the data available at that time.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the U.S. Energy Information Administration, specifically the weekly data published for the U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/LeafHandler.ashx?n=PET&s=WCSSTUS1&f=W.

Note: this market’s resolution source publishes weekly values of U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve in thousands of barrels. Thus, this will be the level of specificity used to resolve this market.

markets.question: Leeds United FC vs. Burnley FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Premier League game between Leeds United FC and Burnley FC, scheduled for May 1 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Leeds United FC and Burnley FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chengdu be 18°C on May 2?
markets.description:

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/chengdu/ZUUU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 23°C high at 34% implied probability for Chengdu on May 2, slightly ahead of 22°C at 26.5%, reflecting the latest China Meteorological Administration guidance and ensemble forecast models like ECMWF and GFS showing peaks clustered around 22-24°C under persistent overcast skies and possible early showers. This cooler-than-average outlook—versus early May climatological norms of 25-26°C—stems from low-level moisture trapped in the Sichuan Basin by weak frontal influences, limiting diurnal heating and solar insolation. Key differentiators include cloud cover density and any afternoon breaks, which could boost peaks by 1°C via enhanced boundary layer mixing; full overcast favors 22°C. Fresh model runs overnight may refine this tight spread before resolution.

events.title: Chungcheongnam Province Governor Election Winner
events.description:
The Chungcheongnam Province gubernatorial election is scheduled to take place in South Korea on June 3, 2026 to elect the next governor of Chungcheongnam Province. 

This market will resolve according to the candidate that wins this election.

If the result of this election isn't known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the South Korean government, specifically the National Election Commission (https://www.nec.go.kr/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Park Soo-hyun's 94% implied probability in the June 3 Chungcheongnam Province gubernatorial election stems from commanding leads in recent polls, including a KBS survey released April 30 showing him at 44% versus incumbent Kim Tae-heum's 23% across all regions, with Democratic Party support at 50% amid strong evaluations of national leadership. His April 15 primary victory over former governor Yang Seung-jo and April 29 National Assembly resignation have solidified challenger momentum against the People Power Party's three-term-seeking Kim, fueled by debates over Daejeon-Chungnam administrative integration. While odds reflect trader consensus on sustained double-digit gaps, late scandals, gaffes, or incumbency-driven turnout surges could narrow the race.

markets.question: Will Jorge Rodríguez be the leader of Venezuela end of 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the individual who officially holds the position of the head of state of Venezuela on Dec 31, 2026 at 12 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, "officially holds" refers to the individual that was formally appointed, confirmed (if confirmation is required), and sworn in as the head of state of Venezuela or otherwise confirmed by official government information as being the head of state of Venezuela. 

If the Venezuelan government does not clearly state who is the head of state, the market will resolve to the individual who is listed as the Head of State by the UN (see: https://www.un.org/dgacm/en/content/protocol/hshgnfa).  

In the event that more than one official head of state is listed by the Venezuelan  government, this market will resolve to the individual who is listed as having primary status. If no distinction is made, the market will resolve to the individual who first assumed the position. 

If no individual holds the position this market will resolve to “No Head of State”. 

The following do NOT constitute "officially holding" the role: nominated, announced, or designated as the head of state of Venezuela but appointment not yet effective; appointed with an effective date after Dec 31, 2026; previously served as the head of state of Venezuela but term has expired, resigned, or been terminated before Dec 31, 2026; serving as the head of state of Venezuela in a consultant, contractor, or unofficial capacity; named as successor or heir apparent to the head of state of Venezuela but not yet appointed; or holding a different role with oversight of the head of state of Venezuela but not the specified position itself.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the UN recognized government of Venezuela. If the Government of Venezuela does not clearly state who is the head of state, information from the UN and a consensus of credible reporting may be used. 

Note: this market is mutually exclusive.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices Nicolás Maduro as the leading Venezuela head of state at year-end 2026 at 66%, reflecting persistent institutional recognition of his January 2025 inauguration despite his January 3 U.S. capture and ongoing New York detention on charges. Delcy Rodríguez, sworn in as interim president shortly after, holds 19.5% amid U.S. sanction relief on April 1, normalized relations, and resumed commercial flights, though her role exceeds the constitution's 90-day temporary absence limit, expiring without extension by July. Opposition figure María Corina Machado trails at 8.5% following her Nobel recognition and transition advocacy, but no elections are scheduled amid slow post-intervention reforms and protests for economic changes. Uncertainty looms over succession procedures and potential U.S.-influenced democratic shifts.

markets.question: Will Steve Hilton finish first in the 2026 California Governor primary election?
markets.description:
The non-partisan primary election for Governor of California is scheduled to take place on June 2, 2026. The top two candidates in this election by number of votes won will advance to the general election for Governor of California.

This market will resolve according to the candidate who receives the most valid votes in this primary election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the results of this election are not definitively known by December 31, 2026, this market will resolve to “Other.”

This market will resolve based on the results of the primary election for Governor of California as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the government of California, specifically the Office of the Secretary of State.
